title: Building a Full-Stack App in 1 Hour – React + Node + PostgreSQL
description:
In this video, we build a complete full-stack application from scratch using React on the frontend, Node.js/Express on the backend, and PostgreSQL as our database.

Timestamps:
0:00 - Intro
2:30 - Setting up the project
10:00 - Building the React frontend
28:00 - Creating the Node.js API
45:00 - Connecting PostgreSQL
58:00 - Final demo

Links:
GitHub Repo: https://github.com/example
Documentation: https://docs.example.com
